title: AI got the blame for the Iran school bombing. The truth is far more worrying
annotation: AI got the blame for the Iran school bombing. The truth is far more worrying

og.title: AI got the blame for the Iran school bombing. The truth is far more worrying
og.description: LLMs-gone-rogue dominated coverage, but had nothing to do with the targeting. Instead, it was choices made by human beings, over many years, that gave us this atrocity
